source_pr.title: *: update import path from coreos/gofail to etcd-io/gofail to fix ci
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

## What have you changed? (mandatory)

gofail change their path from `coreos/gofail` to `etcd-io/gofail` in this commit https://github.com/etcd-io/gofail/commit/be07ede6bb0f7f4944d17b1ef07933807d64d9f2, which will make tidb ci failed.

## What is the type of the changes? (mandatory)

- Improvement (non-breaking change which is an improvement to an existing feature)

## How has this PR been tested? (mandatory)

exist tests

## Does this PR affect documentation (docs/docs-cn) update? (mandatory)

no

## Does this PR affect tidb-ansible update? (mandatory)

no

## Does this PR need to be added to the release notes? (mandatory)

no


## Refer to a related PR or issue link (optional)

## Benchmark result if necessary (optional)

## Add a few positive/negative examples (optional)

fix_pattern: *: update import path from coreos/gofail to etcd-io/gofail to fix ci
